text: Picture this scene. It is midnight at the old library. Luna, our hero, is walking between the tall shelves. The candles are flickering, and the wind is blowing through a broken window. She is searching for the secret book. But wait... behind her, a shadow is moving. Someone is watching her. Luna is holding her breath. The mystery is just beginning.

Hey, it is Alex! I am recording this live from the writing club. Right now, ten students are working on their stories. Marina is typing super fast — I think she is finishing her chapter. Pedro and Bia are reading a comic book together. The teacher is reading the new chapters and smiling. And me? I am waiting for Carolina's next scene, of course!

Luna is walking into the old library. She is searching between the tall shelves. A shadow is moving behind the shelves. She is holding her breath and listening. She is opening the secret book.
I am writing a new chapter.
The hero is exploring the old library.
The villain is hiding in the shadows.
What are you writing right now?
The best part is happening right now!
I am writing chapter three right now.
The candles are flickering.

I am writing a new mystery.
I love writing stories.
I enjoy reading mysteries.
Carolina, what are you writing right now? You look super focused.
My new story! In this scene, the hero is exploring an old library at midnight.
Ooh, a mystery! What is happening around her?
The candles are flickering, and a shadow is moving behind the shelves...
Creepy! Is the villain hiding there?
Maybe! She is holding her breath and listening carefully. You have to wait for the next chapter!
Not fair! I am literally dying of curiosity. You are becoming a real writer!
What are you writing?
